title: Proof-pack cache key and safety contract
purpose: Define the deterministic key material for advisory rch proof-pack cache warming without making cache warmth part of proof correctness.

canonical_components.source: rust-toolchain.toml channel, profile, components, and targets
canonical_components.invalidates_when: The compiler channel, installed target set, or relevant toolchain profile changes.

canonical_components.source: The compilation target triple for the proof lane
canonical_components.invalidates_when: The proof moves between host or cross-compilation targets.

canonical_components.source: Cargo package selected by the proof lane
canonical_components.invalidates_when: A different workspace member or package graph is selected.
Any feature is added, removed, or renamed.

canonical_components.source: Logical proof lane family such as module-microharness, receipt-contract, or dependency-graph
canonical_components.invalidates_when: The proof lane switches to a different build/test family.

canonical_components.source: Keyed environment flags: CARGO_BUILD_JOBS, CARGO_INCREMENTAL, CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG, RUSTDOCFLAGS, RUSTFLAGS

canonical_components.invalidates_when: The branch is not main; non-main refs are refused.
The main commit changes or is unknown.

normalization_rules.env_flags: Include only keyed build-affecting flags and sort by key.
normalization_rules.json: Hash canonical JSON with sorted object keys and compact separators.

refusal_rules.meaning: The input branch is not main, so the cache key must not be emitted for reuse.
The input head sha is missing, non-hex, or otherwise not a concrete commit boundary.
A required cache-key component is absent, so the helper must refuse a reusable key.

safety_contract.stale_cache_behavior: discard cache hint, recompute key, and run proof in an isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR
safety_contract.cache_hit_is_not_evidence: A warm cache may reduce build latency, but it never proves a lane green. Only the actual proof command output can be cited.

guarantees: Equivalent input material produces the same advisory cache key regardless of feature, component, target, or env map ordering.
Dependency, feature, toolchain, target, package, proof-family, env-flag, or main-head changes invalidate the key.
Non-main and unknown refs are refused instead of being normalized into reusable cache keys.
explicit_non_guarantees: Does not read or write remote caches.
Does not run Cargo or rch.
Does not make cache warmth authoritative validation evidence.
